assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMPORARY VIEW round trips from temp schema
assertions.query: SELECT id FROM temp_view_roundtrip;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE TEMPORARY VIEW round trips from temp schema
CREATE RECURSIVE VIEW evaluates recursive definition
assertions.query: SELECT n FROM recursive_nums ORDER BY n;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE VIEW from ordered UNION subqueries
assertions.query: SELECT pk FROM ordered_union_view ORDER BY pk;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE VIEW text domain typmod exposes coerced values
assertions.query:
SELECT v, length(v), c = 'ab '::CHARACTER(3), octet_length(c), pg_typeof(v)::text, pg_typeof(c)::text
						FROM view_text_domain_typmod_reader;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE VIEW text domain typmod exposes coerced values
assertions.query:
SELECT format_type(atttypid, atttypmod)
						FROM pg_attribute
						WHERE attrelid = 'view_text_domain_typmod_reader'::regclass
							AND attnum > 0
						ORDER BY attnum;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER VIEW RENAME TO moves view name
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label
						FROM alter_view_renamed_reader;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER VIEW RENAME TO moves view name
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM alter_view_rename_reader;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column rename
assertions.query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW replace_view_column_name AS
						SELECT 1 AS id, 'new'::text AS renamed_label;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column rename
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM replace_view_column_name;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column type change
assertions.query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW replace_view_column_type AS
						SELECT 1 AS id, 7 AS label;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column type change
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM replace_view_column_type;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column drop
assertions.query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW replace_view_column_drop AS
						SELECT 1 AS id;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column drop
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM replace_view_column_drop;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column reorder
assertions.query:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW replace_view_column_reorder AS
						SELECT 'old'::text AS label, 1 AS id;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW rejects column reorder
assertions.query: SELECT id, label FROM replace_view_column_reorder;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW allows appending columns
assertions.query:
SELECT id, label, active
						FROM replace_view_append_column;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW WITH DATA populates rows
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW timetz typmod materializes rounded value
assertions.query:
SELECT tz::text
						FROM matview_timetz_typmod_reader;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW timetz typmod materializes rounded value
assertions.query:
SELECT format_type(a.atttypid, a.atttypmod)
						FROM pg_catalog.pg_attribute a
						WHERE a.attrelid = 'matview_timetz_typmod_reader'::regclass
							AND a.attname = 'tz';

ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW SET TABLESPACE pg_default
assertions.query: SELECT id FROM alter_matview_default_tablespace_reader;

assertions.query: SELECT id FROM alter_matview_access_method_reader;

assertions.scriptName: ALTER MATERIALIZED VIEW storage parameters persist
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW WITH NO DATA defers population
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW WITH NO DATA does not evaluate query
assertions.query: SELECT value FROM matview_no_data_error;

assertions.scriptName: CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW WITH NO DATA does not evaluate query
assertions.query: REFRESH MATERIALIZED VIEW matview_no_data_error;
